text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And I mean it! I'll do anything! Just say the word,
Big G!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
...Intriguing. So that's the soma you offer me this
day, Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, for your birthday present, I wanted to give
you the coolest thing in the world. I racked my
brain for days about it...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Then I realized! It wouldn't matter what it was,
'cause Big G would still be even cooler! So...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I thought I'd just ask you, the coolest person ever, what you want!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text: Heh, and you said you'd do anything? There is only one thing I desire...

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Rise to the peak of aesthetics yourself, Vodka!
Have the conviction to become the coolest in the
world and embrace your destiny!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Your momentous running, you see, is the aqua
vitae that will stream life into my psyche—and
you will surpass me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wow, even your wishlist is cooler than I can
handle! But I won't break a promise to the
greatest there is! I'll fulfill my destiny!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But that's gonna take me a while to do... So give
me something I can do today!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I guess you're right... Okay, make an
appetizer and some tea, and we'll celebrate with
that.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Food and tea?! Just that's okay? 'Cause you
can choose anything, really!
